claim: U1-MOBIUS-LOCAL-CHECK : PCF A=(-1,0,0,6,3) and PCF B=(-8,0,0,6,4) both converge to L = b(0) + K = 2/log(2) at dps=200, N=4000 (|L_A-L_B|<10^(-150)). PCF A: K_A = -0.114609918... at b(0)=3 -> L=2.8854. PCF B: K_B = -1.114609918... at b(0)=4 -> L=2.8854. K_A - K_B = +1 exactly. NO classical equivalence transformation: a_B/a_A = 8 (constant, OK) but r_n=(6n+4)/(6n+3) yields r_n*r_(n-1) = 40/27, 80/63, 112/91, ... != 8. The two PCFs are limit-level co-evaluators sharing 2/log(2) via independent b(0)-offsets and complementary K-values, NOT classically equivalent.
